name: Thomas, Mabel
motto: Abounding in wit, duty and good philosophy.
clubs: Member of Y. W. C. A.
description: Mabel's the musician of our class, and merry music does she give us. She is an excellent student, as well as a capable and efficient leader. She is always full of fun and is the life of any crowd. Her originality is very prominent in the English themes she writes. She is a good psychologist and will, perhaps, teach psychology some day.
text:
Abounding in wit, duty and good philosophy.
Mabel's the musician of our class, and merry music does she give us. She is an excellent student, as well as a capable and efficient leader. She is always full of fun and is the life of any crowd. Her originality is very prominent in the English themes she writes. She is a good psychologist and will, perhaps, teach psychology some day.

name: Haskins, Lois
motto: Pleasure sometimes, but not always.
clubs: Member of E. A. Poe Society, 1919-23
description: Lois is gentle and good, and has winning ways that we all would like to possess. She is always at her post of duty just on time, and does the social stunt for our classes too. She is always the same sweet girl that everyone loves. She is friendly, and has a smooth and even disposition and is also an excellent entertainer. When once you have been with her, you want to be again.
text:
Pleasure sometimes, but not always.
Lois is gentle and good, and has winning ways that we all would like to possess. She is always at her post of duty just on time, and does the social stunt for our classes too. She is always the same sweet girl that everyone loves. She is friendly, and has a smooth and even disposition and is also an excellent entertainer. When once you have been with her, you want to be again.

name: Johnson, Nonie
motto: A smile is a blessing; a hearty laugh cannot be estimated.
clubs: First Vice-President of entire Alumnae Association
Chairman of Social Service Committee of Y. W. C. A., 1919
President of Pitt County Alumnae Association, 1923
description: Everyone is not gifted with an optimistic nature, but among the few that are is Nonie. It seems good to meet her and hear her cheery, companionable greeting as she passes by. In her sunshiny, happy way, she lives, and, living, makes the world a little more pleasant for the rest of us.
text:
A smile is a blessing; a hearty laugh cannot be estimated.
Everyone is not gifted with an optimistic nature, but among the few that are is Nonie. It seems good to meet her and hear her cheery, companionable greeting as she passes by. In her sunshiny, happy way, she lives, and, living, makes the world a little more pleasant for the rest of us.

name: Maupin, Mildred
motto: A sweet disposition is a gift of the gods.
clubs: Y. W. C. A. Cabinet Member, 1917
Treasurer of Y. W. C. A., 1918
description: No matter how highly we may prize our "Made in Carolina" products, we do not value Mildred less because she is not present in that list. Those of us who have the privilege of knowing her know she is a diligent student, possessing the knack of a ready answer to any question (and it's usually correct). A good friend and a partner in anything that comes within student government limits. A saying that is not applicable to all is true of her: "It is more pleasant to be with her than to be without her."
text:
A sweet disposition is a gift of the gods.
No matter how highly we may prize our "Made in Carolina" products, we do not value Mildred less because she is not present in that list. Those of us who have the privilege of knowing her know she is a diligent student, possessing the knack of a ready answer to any question (and it's usually correct). A good friend and a partner in anything that comes within student government limits. A saying that is not applicable to all is true of her: "It is more pleasant to be with her than to be without her."

name: Hollowell, Orene
motto: She is serious, sometimes gay, Yet she makes things go her way.
description: Of all the things that she can do well tennis stands out prominently. She revels in it, and is never happier than when playing a real, snappy game. With a lot of "pep" and a strong determination to win, she won an enviable record in tennis. This attitude of hers not only makes her a star performer in athletics, but one in other activities as well. She tackles all things with never a thought of failing, and somehow, through all the difficulties, she steers a straight, true course.
text:
She is serious, sometimes gay, Yet she makes things go her way.
Of all the things that she can do well tennis stands out prominently. She revels in it, and is never happier than when playing a real, snappy game. With a lot of "pep" and a strong determination to win, she won an enviable record in tennis. This attitude of hers not only makes her a star performer in athletics, but one in other activities as well. She tackles all things with never a thought of failing, and somehow, through all the difficulties, she steers a straight, true course.

name: Felton, Annie H.
motto: I am resolved to be happy.
text: I am resolved to be happy.

name: Pritchard, Lalla
motto: Smile and the world smiles with you.
text: Smile and the world smiles with you.

name: Allsbrook, Mary Ruth
motto: Work while you work—play while you play.
description: In Ruth we find a combination of sunshine and laughter. She never leaves her smile behind, because it is a part of her. As to her future—well, there are rumors and rumors, you know—but it could be nothing but bright, whether she enters the teaching profession or—some other!
text:
Work while you work—play while you play.
In Ruth we find a combination of sunshine and laughter. She never leaves her smile behind, because it is a part of her. As to her future—well, there are rumors and rumors, you know—but it could be nothing but bright, whether she enters the teaching profession or—some other!

name: Arnold, Annie Lola
motto: Her hair is not more sunny than her smile.
description: There's a ray of sunshine to be found in the darkest places when Annie Lola is around. A sweet disposition, a strong friend, a good sport—all these are found in her.
text:
Her hair is not more sunny than her smile.
There's a ray of sunshine to be found in the darkest places when Annie Lola is around. A sweet disposition, a strong friend, a good sport—all these are found in her.

name: Baggett, Mary
motto: I pin my faith to no man's sleeve, Have I not two eyes of my own.
description: They say that daisies won't tell, but if you want to tell anything, tell Mary. She is the most confidential girl on the hill, and as true as steel. Loyal, dependable, studious—that's Mary.
text:
I pin my faith to no man's sleeve, Have I not two eyes of my own.
They say that daisies won't tell, but if you want to tell anything, tell Mary. She is the most confidential girl on the hill, and as true as steel. Loyal, dependable, studious—that's Mary.

name: Barber, Arline
motto: Behind those blue eyes there lies much mischief.
description: Arline is a girl who needs no one to lead her. She does what she thinks is best, and is seldom wrong in it. One would hardly think there is much fire behind those blue eyes, but woe unto you if you try to find out. She stands well in her class, and with all the "get up" she has I am sure she will make a success in whatever she undertakes.
text:
Behind those blue eyes there lies much mischief.
Arline is a girl who needs no one to lead her. She does what she thinks is best, and is seldom wrong in it. One would hardly think there is much fire behind those blue eyes, but woe unto you if you try to find out. She stands well in her class, and with all the "get up" she has I am sure she will make a success in whatever she undertakes.

name: Barnes, Elma
motto: Smile and the world smiles with you.
description: Elma is a hard worker, and she always meets her tasks and difficulties with a smile. We know that her strong ambition and her sunny disposition will bring her much success wherever she is.
text:
Smile and the world smiles with you.
Elma is a hard worker, and she always meets her tasks and difficulties with a smile. We know that her strong ambition and her sunny disposition will bring her much success wherever she is.

name: Beaman, Mildred
motto: To see her is to love her, To know her is to praise.
description: If you desire a pal with a sunny, lovable disposition, seek Mildred. Lucky are they who gain the loyal, affectionate friendship of this true-hearted girl.
text:
To see her is to love her, To know her is to praise.
If you desire a pal with a sunny, lovable disposition, seek Mildred. Lucky are they who gain the loyal, affectionate friendship of this true-hearted girl.

name: Zulu, Belle
motto: She can who thinks she can.
description: Here she comes! Happy-go-lucky girl! Good natured, dependable. What more could be said of her? She always smiles and changes our gloom to mirth. We expect to hear of Zulu later, and perhaps she'll be found "seconding the motion."
text:
She can who thinks she can.
Here she comes! Happy-go-lucky girl! Good natured, dependable. What more could be said of her? She always smiles and changes our gloom to mirth. We expect to hear of Zulu later, and perhaps she'll be found "seconding the motion."

name: Blackmore, Nora
motto: To thine own self be true.
description: Nora hails from Warsaw. She's a serious-minded girl, and realizes a sense of duty. Even though she has a serious view of life, she has a sense of humor. She never talks unless she has something to say, and she never fails to help those less fortunate than herself. Though rather quiet, she has the knack of winning many friends, and I think it can be truthfully said that those won are never lost.
text:
To thine own self be true.
Nora hails from Warsaw. She's a serious-minded girl, and realizes a sense of duty. Even though she has a serious view of life, she has a sense of humor. She never talks unless she has something to say, and she never fails to help those less fortunate than herself. Though rather quiet, she has the knack of winning many friends, and I think it can be truthfully said that those won are never lost.

name: Boswell, Hattie
motto: With a heart of cheer I like the girl who faces what she must.
description: Hattie is our ambitious girl—one who always wants to lead her class, and thus far has realized her desire. "On time and never late" is her motto, and she's always "there" ready for business.
text:
With a heart of cheer I like the girl who faces what she must.
Hattie is our ambitious girl—one who always wants to lead her class, and thus far has realized her desire. "On time and never late" is her motto, and she's always "there" ready for business.

name: Bradley, Edythe
motto: She may be serious, she may be gay, But she's a rare good pal in a rare good way.
description: What a number of different qualities we find in Edythe. If she can't create excitement in any other way, she just starts raving about "Roy." We all feel if Edythe doesn't tell us the latest school news, we would be hopelessly lost. She makes such a handsome man that some of the Juniors have been heard to say, "Oh, wasn't Edythe Bradley the best looking man?" Edythe has stage ambition, and unless something happens, and happens soon, I'm afraid it will be a hopeless case for the "Dr." But we feel sure she will succeed in whatever she undertakes. Good luck to you, old girl!
text:
She may be serious, she may be gay, But she's a rare good pal in a rare good way.
What a number of different qualities we find in Edythe. If she can't create excitement in any other way, she just starts raving about "Roy." We all feel if Edythe doesn't tell us the latest school news, we would be hopelessly lost. She makes such a handsome man that some of the Juniors have been heard to say, "Oh, wasn't Edythe Bradley the best looking man?" Edythe has stage ambition, and unless something happens, and happens soon, I'm afraid it will be a hopeless case for the "Dr." But we feel sure she will succeed in whatever she undertakes. Good luck to you, old girl!

name: Braswell, Rosa
motto: To know her is to love her.
description: A funny girl is Rosa. At times she is as quiet as our history recitation period, and again she chatters and giggles without ceasing. In class we never hear much from her, but when she is among her friends she is always talking and expressing her opinion. Rosa has been a member of our class only a year, but she leaves a place that will be hard to fill when she is gone.
text:
To know her is to love her.
A funny girl is Rosa. At times she is as quiet as our history recitation period, and again she chatters and giggles without ceasing. In class we never hear much from her, but when she is among her friends she is always talking and expressing her opinion. Rosa has been a member of our class only a year, but she leaves a place that will be hard to fill when she is gone.

name: Bray, Nannie
motto: Shun not the struggle; face it.
description: Nannie is a pal good and true—a bright, energetic girl, never shirking the most difficult task, but always meeting it with a feeling of, "I can do it if I try." Though she isn't heard much, we all know she has a lovable disposition, and the class feels fortunate in having such a friend.
text:
Shun not the struggle; face it.
Nannie is a pal good and true—a bright, energetic girl, never shirking the most difficult task, but always meeting it with a feeling of, "I can do it if I try." Though she isn't heard much, we all know she has a lovable disposition, and the class feels fortunate in having such a friend.

name: Myra, Bridgeman
motto: She's kind, she's modest, sincere, and true, More studious, more generous than most of you.
description: Myra is quiet, dignified and faithful to a degree that commands admiration from her classmates; a good, lovable girl, whose high sense of humor exceeds the average. She is jolly and full of life, and will always be remembered as a loyal comrade.
text:
She's kind, she's modest, sincere, and true, More studious, more generous than most of you.
Myra is quiet, dignified and faithful to a degree that commands admiration from her classmates; a good, lovable girl, whose high sense of humor exceeds the average. She is jolly and full of life, and will always be remembered as a loyal comrade.

name: Eloise, Bridger
motto: Not afraid of work, but not in sympathy with it.
description: Where can you find Eloise on a sunny afternoon at 3:30, when not in school? Rest room. What does Eloise like better than "Lib" and "Lil?" Hot chocolate. What does Eloise like better than math? Spelling. One of the prettiest girls in the class, she knows just what to wear to look her best. A good sport and a true pal are her chief characteristics.
text:
Not afraid of work, but not in sympathy with it.
Where can you find Eloise on a sunny afternoon at 3:30, when not in school? Rest room. What does Eloise like better than "Lib" and "Lil?" Hot chocolate. What does Eloise like better than math? Spelling. One of the prettiest girls in the class, she knows just what to wear to look her best. A good sport and a true pal are her chief characteristics.

name: Lillian, Britt
motto: To know her is to love her.
description: Lillian is a girl of rare type, and her ingenuity will keep her always in the right. She gives her whole soul and being to her work, and a duty she never shirks.
text:
To know her is to love her.
Lillian is a girl of rare type, and her ingenuity will keep her always in the right. She gives her whole soul and being to her work, and a duty she never shirks.

name: Ruth, Britton
motto: Not too serious, not too gay, But a good fellow day by day.
description: Ruth is one of our band who is good-hearted and sympathetic to the very highest degree. She is usually found directing her own business, yet she takes an active part in every organization of which she is a member. She does her work well, and then has time to sit on the campus and converse with her friends as they come and go.
text:
Not too serious, not too gay, But a good fellow day by day.
Ruth is one of our band who is good-hearted and sympathetic to the very highest degree. She is usually found directing her own business, yet she takes an active part in every organization of which she is a member. She does her work well, and then has time to sit on the campus and converse with her friends as they come and go.

name: Mildred, Brodie
motto: Pluck makes luck.
description: Mildred likes college life in general, but home much better. At first she thought of college life as a joke, but one day something intercepted her path which caused her to take life more seriously—practice teaching. She is very ambitious. Watch her succeed!
text:
Pluck makes luck.
Mildred likes college life in general, but home much better. At first she thought of college life as a joke, but one day something intercepted her path which caused her to take life more seriously—practice teaching. She is very ambitious. Watch her succeed!

name: Helen, Brown
motto: What is worth doing at all is worth doing well.
description: Although we did not enjoy the privilege of having Helen as a "C," we have doubly enjoyed having her as a "D." She is a rare combination of attractiveness and diligence—a girl who is a valuable asset to the class, and one whom we all admire.
text:
What is worth doing at all is worth doing well.
Although we did not enjoy the privilege of having Helen as a "C," we have doubly enjoyed having her as a "D." She is a rare combination of attractiveness and diligence—a girl who is a valuable asset to the class, and one whom we all admire.

name: Brown, Kathryn
motto: Life without laughing is a dreary blank.
description: Avoid strong drink—for coffee maketh you nervous! A good sport? Indeed she is, and the "Committee" couldn't exist without "Kat." Besides the success she makes in the teaching profession, she's specializing in the art of making friends—she's succeeding there, too, (like everything else she attempts), 'cause everybody likes "Kat." She's a jolly good pal, but she has a serious side, too,—specially when one of the "Committee" has an idea.
text:
Life without laughing is a dreary blank.
Avoid strong drink—for coffee maketh you nervous! A good sport? Indeed she is, and the "Committee" couldn't exist without "Kat." Besides the success she makes in the teaching profession, she's specializing in the art of making friends—she's succeeding there, too, (like everything else she attempts), 'cause everybody likes "Kat." She's a jolly good pal, but she has a serious side, too,—specially when one of the "Committee" has an idea.

name: Bruce, Bonita
motto: Age cannot wither her, nor custom stale her infinite variety.
description: There is never a dark cloud but has a silver lining. When searching for this silver lining look for "Pid." If she cannot cheer you with words, her music will, for our violinist is "Pid." An all-round sport is "Pid," and we can only say, "She's the stuff!"
text:
Age cannot wither her, nor custom stale her infinite variety.
There is never a dark cloud but has a silver lining. When searching for this silver lining look for "Pid." If she cannot cheer you with words, her music will, for our violinist is "Pid." An all-round sport is "Pid," and we can only say, "She's the stuff!"

name: Bryan, Arnette
motto: A sunny disposition is half the battle.
description: Arnette is the little sunshine of our class. No matter what be the trouble, she always has a "prophecy" which drives away our frowns in a jiffy. Maybe that "prophecy" is what makes her so popular. She is always giving sunshine in the darkest places and the gloom of studies, and that is why we all love her so.
text:
A sunny disposition is half the battle.
Arnette is the little sunshine of our class. No matter what be the trouble, she always has a "prophecy" which drives away our frowns in a jiffy. Maybe that "prophecy" is what makes her so popular. She is always giving sunshine in the darkest places and the gloom of studies, and that is why we all love her so.

name: Bunch, Bonnie
motto: She is jolly, good-natured and true, And her share she is willing to do.
description: Bonnie, who is blessed with personality and gifted with charm that makes everlasting friends, will always be remembered by her classmates as companionable, unselfish and lovable. In her jolly way she goes around advocating the saying, "Laugh and the world laughs with you; weep, and you weep alone."
text:
She is jolly, good-natured and true, And her share she is willing to do.
Bonnie, who is blessed with personality and gifted with charm that makes everlasting friends, will always be remembered by her classmates as companionable, unselfish and lovable. In her jolly way she goes around advocating the saying, "Laugh and the world laughs with you; weep, and you weep alone."

name: Burbage, Nellie
motto: She is pretty to walk with, interesting to talk with, and pleasant, too, to think on.
description: Nellie is a very studious girl, and very ambitious to make a success. The class of '23 feels that Nellie's efforts to make a success will not be in vain. She will be either an "Old Maid School Teacher," for which she is now training—or—well, a teacher of one. Who? Err Ronald!
text:
She is pretty to walk with, interesting to talk with, and pleasant, too, to think on.
Nellie is a very studious girl, and very ambitious to make a success. The class of '23 feels that Nellie's efforts to make a success will not be in vain. She will be either an "Old Maid School Teacher," for which she is now training—or—well, a teacher of one. Who? Err Ronald!

name: Carrington, Lucie Pearle
motto: Divinely tall, and full of grace, Surely you know this maiden with the lovely face.
description: Conscientious! Now, you've said it! "Shortie's" authoritative personality, winsome ways and sunny disposition has won a place in our hearts for her.
text:
Divinely tall, and full of grace, Surely you know this maiden with the lovely face.
Conscientious! Now, you've said it! "Shortie's" authoritative personality, winsome ways and sunny disposition has won a place in our hearts for her.

name: Gayle Cheek
motto: Still waters run deep.
description: With her dainty and lovable way, has won a place in each of our hearts. She is never too busy that she cannot find time to play tennis for one-half hour every afternoon. At this rate she will soon fulfill her desire to be a champion tennis player.
text:
Still waters run deep.
With her dainty and lovable way, has won a place in each of our hearts. She is never too busy that she cannot find time to play tennis for one-half hour every afternoon. At this rate she will soon fulfill her desire to be a champion tennis player.

name: Louise Diggs
motto: When duty and pleasure clash, let duty go to smash.
description: When Louise is around, we are always sure of a good time. But she isn't all frivolity, and in the serious side of her we find equally as much to love as in the frivolous. We think Louise is living up to her favorite slogan, "Day by day, in every way, I'm growing fatter and fatter, and better and better."
text:
When duty and pleasure clash, let duty go to smash.
When Louise is around, we are always sure of a good time. But she isn't all frivolity, and in the serious side of her we find equally as much to love as in the frivolous. We think Louise is living up to her favorite slogan, "Day by day, in every way, I'm growing fatter and fatter, and better and better."

name: Grace Dixon
motto: 'Doll Baby' is what we call her. Look and see if you don't agree.
description: Petite? Yes, but it happens to be quality this time instead of quantity. Her favorite expression is, "I am about to laugh." Three cheers for "Doll Baby," the cutest girl in the class of '23.
text:
'Doll Baby' is what we call her. Look and see if you don't agree.
Petite? Yes, but it happens to be quality this time instead of quantity. Her favorite expression is, "I am about to laugh." Three cheers for "Doll Baby," the cutest girl in the class of '23.

name: Maggie Dixon
motto: If 'Rice' is the 'Staff-of-life,' you'll never hear of 'Mag' yielding to the punishment known as starvation.
description: Even though the "best-all-round" and "most influential" are parts of her make-up, you'll never miss hearing a "sporty" report when you mention the following three: "Bottle," "door" and "cafe." And now that the time has come for her to depart from the class which has been guided by her leadership during the years of '21 and '23, we grant her the privilege of establishing a "Banking and Trust Co." anywhere she so desires.
text:
If 'Rice' is the 'Staff-of-life,' you'll never hear of 'Mag' yielding to the punishment known as starvation.
Even though the "best-all-round" and "most influential" are parts of her make-up, you'll never miss hearing a "sporty" report when you mention the following three: "Bottle," "door" and "cafe." And now that the time has come for her to depart from the class which has been guided by her leadership during the years of '21 and '23, we grant her the privilege of establishing a "Banking and Trust Co." anywhere she so desires.

name: Clara Dowdy
motto: Where there's a will there's a way.
description: Clara has just the proper mixture of common sense and justice, severity and sweetness to make her loved and respected by all. She is always there when it comes to work in Y.W.C.A., Society and other College organizations. Clara is dependable, otherwise she would never have been voted the most reliable girl in our class. Her strong character and strong will tell us that she will eventually, with Ora, carry out her long-cherished travel plan.
text:
Where there's a will there's a way.
Clara has just the proper mixture of common sense and justice, severity and sweetness to make her loved and respected by all. She is always there when it comes to work in Y.W.C.A., Society and other College organizations. Clara is dependable, otherwise she would never have been voted the most reliable girl in our class. Her strong character and strong will tell us that she will eventually, with Ora, carry out her long-cherished travel plan.

name: Hilda Duke
motto: Life is full of laughter, but even laughter ends, Give me instead forever the friendship of my friends.
description: Here's to "Red," the musician of the class, who is always there when music is wanted. For two years she has been a leader in the musical and social world of E.C.T.C. What are we "gonna" do without her? "Red" is the best old sport in the world. If everyone were "Red" there wouldn't be a single stranger to be found. She is willing to play for a crowd, but a crowd doesn't stop her, for she might even play for "Moore."
text:
Life is full of laughter, but even laughter ends, Give me instead forever the friendship of my friends.
Here's to "Red," the musician of the class, who is always there when music is wanted. For two years she has been a leader in the musical and social world of E.C.T.C. What are we "gonna" do without her? "Red" is the best old sport in the world. If everyone were "Red" there wouldn't be a single stranger to be found. She is willing to play for a crowd, but a crowd doesn't stop her, for she might even play for "Moore."

name: Edgerton, Thelma
motto: A perfect woman, nobly planned, To warm, to comfort, to command.
description: To like Thelma you have to know her. Knowing her you will find her a valuable companion. She is always ready with a winning smile to solve any problem that might confront you. As for her being a good student, examine her reports and draw your own conclusions. Though we know not her ambitions, we predict success for her.
text:
A perfect woman, nobly planned, To warm, to comfort, to command.
To like Thelma you have to know her. Knowing her you will find her a valuable companion. She is always ready with a winning smile to solve any problem that might confront you. As for her being a good student, examine her reports and draw your own conclusions. Though we know not her ambitions, we predict success for her.

name: Eure, Louise
motto: Who can express thee, though all can approve thee.
description: Here is a girl who has instilled in her a heart of a true friend. She is very much interested in music, and we predict success for her in the musical world.
text:
Who can express thee, though all can approve thee.
Here is a girl who has instilled in her a heart of a true friend. She is very much interested in music, and we predict success for her in the musical world.

name: Evans, Ora
motto: Strive and succeed.
description: Ora is a splendid worker in all college organizations and anything else that calls for capability. She performs her many duties in such an unassuming manner that we often wonder how they are done so well. In addition, she has that indefinable something called personality, which makes her liked by everyone.
text:
Strive and succeed.
Ora is a splendid worker in all college organizations and anything else that calls for capability. She performs her many duties in such an unassuming manner that we often wonder how they are done so well. In addition, she has that indefinable something called personality, which makes her liked by everyone.

name: Exum, Geneva
motto: She hath a daily beauty in her life.
description: When seeking information go to Geneva and you will be sure of your desires. Bright and industrious is Geneva, and always anxious to help others. Sweet, good, and kind have we found her—the same yesterday, today and tomorrow.
text:
She hath a daily beauty in her life.
When seeking information go to Geneva and you will be sure of your desires. Bright and industrious is Geneva, and always anxious to help others. Sweet, good, and kind have we found her—the same yesterday, today and tomorrow.

name: Farless, Bess
motto: To know her is to love her.
description: Everybody likes Bess! With her lovable and generous disposition she has won many friends, to whom she is capable of being a genuine friend in return. She never considers a favor too great to do for a fellow-student—except to share mail coming from Carolina!
text:
To know her is to love her.
Everybody likes Bess! With her lovable and generous disposition she has won many friends, to whom she is capable of being a genuine friend in return. She never considers a favor too great to do for a fellow-student—except to share mail coming from Carolina!

name: Fletcher, Clarice
motto: Sweet music breathed her soul away.
description: This quiet girl doesn't stand out as a star performer in any particular branch of work, but she is a steady and earnest worker in everything she undertakes. We realize her capabilities, and predict her success in the world.
text:
Sweet music breathed her soul away.
This quiet girl doesn't stand out as a star performer in any particular branch of work, but she is a steady and earnest worker in everything she undertakes. We realize her capabilities, and predict her success in the world.

name: Lillian, Gray
motto: Success always comes to those who labor.
description: Judging from Lillian's appearance in the classroom you might think of her as being a quiet and easy-going girl. To see her on the basketball court you would consider her a champion basketball player. An interesting characteristic is that she has an unusually quiet and unconscious way of attracting and winning the admiration of the opposite sex.
text:
Success always comes to those who labor.
Judging from Lillian's appearance in the classroom you might think of her as being a quiet and easy-going girl. To see her on the basketball court you would consider her a champion basketball player. An interesting characteristic is that she has an unusually quiet and unconscious way of attracting and winning the admiration of the opposite sex.

name: Clara, Grissom
motto: Some folks are content to envy success in others. Others achieve it for themselves.
description: At our first acquaintance with Clara we discovered that she was endowed with the "gift of gab." She is one of those folks who make you forget to feel blue. Her happy disposition, plus her good sportive nature, has made for her a host of true friends. For Clara we predict a brilliant future, especially in the political world.
text:
Some folks are content to envy success in others. Others achieve it for themselves.
At our first acquaintance with Clara we discovered that she was endowed with the "gift of gab." She is one of those folks who make you forget to feel blue. Her happy disposition, plus her good sportive nature, has made for her a host of true friends. For Clara we predict a brilliant future, especially in the political world.

name: Mabel, Guffy
motto: Quiet in appearance, with motives unknown.
description: Mabel is a quiet girl of few words, sticking strictly to her own business. She will always be ready to say, "I will try," when called on for any duty.
text:
Quiet in appearance, with motives unknown.
Mabel is a quiet girl of few words, sticking strictly to her own business. She will always be ready to say, "I will try," when called on for any duty.

name: Virginia, Harper
motto: The mildest manners with the bravest mind.
description: Virginia has been an invaluable asset to the class—whether it is work or play she is "right there" when she is wanted. The girl who counts Virginia her friend is lucky, for her friendship is truly worthwhile. With her sweet disposition, strong character and strong will, she deserves the best that life holds, and we truly hope she may get it.
text:
The mildest manners with the bravest mind.
Virginia has been an invaluable asset to the class—whether it is work or play she is "right there" when she is wanted. The girl who counts Virginia her friend is lucky, for her friendship is truly worthwhile. With her sweet disposition, strong character and strong will, she deserves the best that life holds, and we truly hope she may get it.

name: Martha, Harrell
motto: I'll be merry, I'll be free, I'll be sad for nobody.
description: Good-natured, happy-go-lucky Martha is one of the best. Broad-mindedness, supplemented by personality, wit and originality, make her one of the most popular at E. C. T. C. Always in a hurry—yet there is always time if you must talk to her about your troubles. Martha, we feel sure the future holds much success and happiness for you.
text:
I'll be merry, I'll be free, I'll be sad for nobody.
Good-natured, happy-go-lucky Martha is one of the best. Broad-mindedness, supplemented by personality, wit and originality, make her one of the most popular at E. C. T. C. Always in a hurry—yet there is always time if you must talk to her about your troubles. Martha, we feel sure the future holds much success and happiness for you.

name: Irma, Harrison
motto: She hath a genius to be loved.
description: Irma is blessed with an unlimited amount of humor. She is always ready to laugh at a good joke, and frequently has one to offer. Had one visited the library during Irma's Senior year, he would have found that she was very studious. Irma's personality is very prominent, and for the rest notice the statistics.
text:
She hath a genius to be loved.
Irma is blessed with an unlimited amount of humor. She is always ready to laugh at a good joke, and frequently has one to offer. Had one visited the library during Irma's Senior year, he would have found that she was very studious. Irma's personality is very prominent, and for the rest notice the statistics.

name: Hedgepeth, Willie Mae
motto: How good to live and learn.
description: Willie Mae is not one of the species that you can knock down and she comes up smiling. She is in a good humor when a good humor is appropriate, but, take my word for it, she lets nobody "walk over" her. Willie Mae likes school studies, but enough fun and "good time" to flavor 'em up.
text:
How good to live and learn.
Willie Mae is not one of the species that you can knock down and she comes up smiling. She is in a good humor when a good humor is appropriate, but, take my word for it, she lets nobody "walk over" her. Willie Mae likes school studies, but enough fun and "good time" to flavor 'em up.

name: Hendren, Mary
motto: Joy, temperance, and repose Slam the door on the doctor's nose.
description: For effective primary supplementary material, see Mary at address given. In our class there is no one more reliable, faithful, and generous. And above all—she is a good old pal.
text:
Joy, temperance, and repose Slam the door on the doctor's nose.
For effective primary supplementary material, see Mary at address given. In our class there is no one more reliable, faithful, and generous. And above all—she is a good old pal.

name: Holland, Cora
motto: No sinner, nor saint, perhaps, But, well—the very best of chaps.
description: Cora is just an "all-round" girl, and possesses that rare quality of being the same wherever you see her. She spends a great deal of time writing letters, and it is a certain fact that she is devoted to the "mails." Her "Special" boxes on Sunday are the salvation of quite a few. We are expecting great things of her in the musical world if the "Bills" are not too many.
text:
No sinner, nor saint, perhaps, But, well—the very best of chaps.
Cora is just an "all-round" girl, and possesses that rare quality of being the same wherever you see her. She spends a great deal of time writing letters, and it is a certain fact that she is devoted to the "mails." Her "Special" boxes on Sunday are the salvation of quite a few. We are expecting great things of her in the musical world if the "Bills" are not too many.

name: Holland, Margaret
motto: Her greatest ambition—I regret to state, Is this—to graduate!
description: Even if this is her greatest ambition, it isn't her only one. For her best friends know that there is a tall, dark-haired man, from whom "Specials" are a delight to her. And it seems she is about to gain both her ambitions. We all wish her success.
text:
Her greatest ambition—I regret to state, Is this—to graduate!
Even if this is her greatest ambition, it isn't her only one. For her best friends know that there is a tall, dark-haired man, from whom "Specials" are a delight to her. And it seems she is about to gain both her ambitions. We all wish her success.

name: Hollowell, Annie Ola
motto: Thy modesty is a candle to thy merit.
description: Quiet, sedate and reserved is Annie Ola, and we agree that if "Beauty is as beauty does" she, too, is quite beautiful. She is a faithful and capable worker. We can't forget the way she always stood by her class basketball team. Her actions are always from honest motives, and mindful of her fellow-man. We have all learned to love her.
text:
Thy modesty is a candle to thy merit.
Quiet, sedate and reserved is Annie Ola, and we agree that if "Beauty is as beauty does" she, too, is quite beautiful. She is a faithful and capable worker. We can't forget the way she always stood by her class basketball team. Her actions are always from honest motives, and mindful of her fellow-man. We have all learned to love her.

name: Hummell, Elizabeth
motto: To sum up all, be merry, I advise, And as we are merry, may we still be wise.
description: Fate always sends Elizabeth where someone needs a cheerful word—a veritable Pollyanna. She is ready for all the fun, as well as her share of work. Her intimate friends know how loyal and kind Elizabeth is, with all her love for a good time. She is always thoughtful, and one of those who helps to make school life enjoyable.
text:
To sum up all, be merry, I advise, And as we are merry, may we still be wise.
Fate always sends Elizabeth where someone needs a cheerful word—a veritable Pollyanna. She is ready for all the fun, as well as her share of work. Her intimate friends know how loyal and kind Elizabeth is, with all her love for a good time. She is always thoughtful, and one of those who helps to make school life enjoyable.

name: Inman, Martha
motto: Not too serious, not too gay. But a rare good fellow when it comes to play.
description: Here's the girl of our class who is our star athlete. She played in all the final tournaments for the year '22. A helpful member and a thoughtful girl.
text:
Not too serious, not too gay. But a rare good fellow when it comes to play.
Here's the girl of our class who is our star athlete. She played in all the final tournaments for the year '22. A helpful member and a thoughtful girl.

name: Jackson, Thelma
motto: I chatter, chatter as I go.
description: Thelma is a "come-what-may" type of a girl. She thinks only of today and lets tomorrow take care of itself. Though very brilliant and studious, she always finds time for a little fun—if the teacher's back is turned. When she laughs, all eyes fall directly upon her. The class of '23 sends her out with a brilliant future.
text:
I chatter, chatter as I go.
Thelma is a "come-what-may" type of a girl. She thinks only of today and lets tomorrow take care of itself. Though very brilliant and studious, she always finds time for a little fun—if the teacher's back is turned. When she laughs, all eyes fall directly upon her. The class of '23 sends her out with a brilliant future.

name: Jeanette, Hilda
motto: Laugh and the world laughs with you.
description: Hilda is a happy-go-lucky type of a girl—never worries, but always comes out on top. She has the "gift of gab" along with a mathematic brain. Nothing is more delightful to her than to deal with figures. We wish her success in her future work.
text:
Laugh and the world laughs with you.
Hilda is a happy-go-lucky type of a girl—never worries, but always comes out on top. She has the "gift of gab" along with a mathematic brain. Nothing is more delightful to her than to deal with figures. We wish her success in her future work.

name: Jenkins, Pattie
motto: I hold ever, virtue and knowledge were endowments greater than nobleness and riches.
description: A sweeter girl cannot be found. She goes about with that smile of happiness and content which she shares with everyone. Pattie stands high, not only among her friends, but her class. Industrious and straightforward in every way is Pattie.
text:
I hold ever, virtue and knowledge were endowments greater than nobleness and riches.
A sweeter girl cannot be found. She goes about with that smile of happiness and content which she shares with everyone. Pattie stands high, not only among her friends, but her class. Industrious and straightforward in every way is Pattie.

name: Jones, Lillian
motto: She looks wise. Pray correct that error.
description: She is the kind of girl we all love—a good sport—a real pal—kind, amiable, unselfish and attractive. Schoolmates will find it hard to forget her, and classmates cannot. Her room-mate never fails to tell of the "only one fuss" they had during the two years. She follows the example especially when eating is the practice.
text:
She looks wise. Pray correct that error.
She is the kind of girl we all love—a good sport—a real pal—kind, amiable, unselfish and attractive. Schoolmates will find it hard to forget her, and classmates cannot. Her room-mate never fails to tell of the "only one fuss" they had during the two years. She follows the example especially when eating is the practice.

name: Jordan, Lillian
motto: It doesn't pay to worry, Things will happen, anyway.
description: You may search the world over, but you will never find another like Lillian. Her wit and originality has won many friends. She is true blue, and we count it a privilege to have her as one of our pals. -ness is her chief characteristic.
text:
It doesn't pay to worry, Things will happen, anyway.
You may search the world over, but you will never find another like Lillian. Her wit and originality has won many friends. She is true blue, and we count it a privilege to have her as one of our pals. -ness is her chief characteristic.

name: Kennedy, Hazel
motto: I leave thy praises unexpressed, I leave thy greatness to be guessed.
description: Hazel has always responded gracefully to the demand for originality in the class of '23. She has her own opinions—reliable ones—which she expresses, regardless of contradiction. As for athletics, watch her handle the basketball, and draw your own conclusions.
text:
I leave thy praises unexpressed, I leave thy greatness to be guessed.
Hazel has always responded gracefully to the demand for originality in the class of '23. She has her own opinions—reliable ones—which she expresses, regardless of contradiction. As for athletics, watch her handle the basketball, and draw your own conclusions.

name: Lancaster, Annie Joe
motto: A perfect woman, nobly planned, To warn, to comfort, and command.
description: Who said Annie had a "Special"? Judging from her Clement disposition, you would not dare wonder at the number. She is coquettish, striking and a good all-round sport. Teachers College is proud of her, and boosts her, for she knows her influence as a teacher will be great.
text:
A perfect woman, nobly planned, To warn, to comfort, and command.
Who said Annie had a "Special"? Judging from her Clement disposition, you would not dare wonder at the number. She is coquettish, striking and a good all-round sport. Teachers College is proud of her, and boosts her, for she knows her influence as a teacher will be great.

name: Link, Beatrice
motto: Her name is Link, and she is a golden link in the friendship chain of many.
description: "Bee" is a very quiet, dignified girl, and possesses a store of knowledge. She isn't a "chatterbox," but when she does speak it is worth your while to listen. She worries and worries about her practice teaching, but we always find her coming out on top in the end, and we know she will succeed when she goes away. "Red headed" people are always great!
text:
Her name is Link, and she is a golden link in the friendship chain of many.
"Bee" is a very quiet, dignified girl, and possesses a store of knowledge. She isn't a "chatterbox," but when she does speak it is worth your while to listen. She worries and worries about her practice teaching, but we always find her coming out on top in the end, and we know she will succeed when she goes away. "Red headed" people are always great!

name: Lyon, Mildred
motto: Best things come in smallest packages.
description: In this particular "small package" we find wit and humor galore; the truest of friendship, an enviable disposition, and a spirit of good sportsmanship.
text:
Best things come in smallest packages.
In this particular "small package" we find wit and humor galore; the truest of friendship, an enviable disposition, and a spirit of good sportsmanship.

name: Matthews, Willie
description: Willie is a modest, quiet, unobtrusive young lady. She is the embodiment of thoughtfulness and unselfishness, with a generous share of humor. Her books, as well as her classmates, have found in her a friend staunch and true.
text: Willie is a modest, quiet, unobtrusive young lady. She is the embodiment of thoughtfulness and unselfishness, with a generous share of humor. Her books, as well as her classmates, have found in her a friend staunch and true.

name: Mayo, Matilda
motto: Matilda can dance, Matilda can walk, But no one can beat Matilda talk.
description: Dear old "Tilley"! Though a big talker of our school, is one we all love and cherish. She never studies—never had to, really, but every once in awhile her conscience sends out a warning, so she grabs a book, runs to the library and reads references long since due, jots down a few notes frantically, then goes to breathe sweet air once more. No, "Tilley" is not a joke—she's just a fine, wholesome, whole-souled girl, and we all love her.
text:
Matilda can dance, Matilda can walk, But no one can beat Matilda talk.
Dear old "Tilley"! Though a big talker of our school, is one we all love and cherish. She never studies—never had to, really, but every once in awhile her conscience sends out a warning, so she grabs a book, runs to the library and reads references long since due, jots down a few notes frantically, then goes to breathe sweet air once more. No, "Tilley" is not a joke—she's just a fine, wholesome, whole-souled girl, and we all love her.

name: Rosale, Mcfachin
motto: Rosalie smiled, and all the world was gay.
description: It is an important "tour-de-force" to attempt to sketch so admirable a character in so little space. We can only say that during her two years here she has steadily grown in the esteem of her classmates. She is a good student, a girl of solid judgment and with a good sense of humor.
text:
Rosalie smiled, and all the world was gay.
It is an important "tour-de-force" to attempt to sketch so admirable a character in so little space. We can only say that during her two years here she has steadily grown in the esteem of her classmates. She is a good student, a girl of solid judgment and with a good sense of humor.

name: Vera, Miller
motto: A little curly-headed, good for nothing; A mischief-maker from her birth.
description: Just say athletics, and see her eyes beam; She plays on the Volley Ball and Basketball teams. And to add to her honor and fame, She has the President of Athletics attached to her name. She loves cats of every variety, So we place her in the Poe Society.
text:
A little curly-headed, good for nothing; A mischief-maker from her birth.
Just say athletics, and see her eyes beam; She plays on the Volley Ball and Basketball teams. And to add to her honor and fame, She has the President of Athletics attached to her name. She loves cats of every variety, So we place her in the Poe Society.

name: Mabel, Montague
motto: Life is real; life is earnest.
description: One glance at her brown eyes tells the tale. Besides having a sunny, good nature, we find that she has those characteristics of personality and character that naturally make people like her. Mabel is an earnest student, and we feel sure that the way to success is open to her.
text:
Life is real; life is earnest.
One glance at her brown eyes tells the tale. Besides having a sunny, good nature, we find that she has those characteristics of personality and character that naturally make people like her. Mabel is an earnest student, and we feel sure that the way to success is open to her.

name: Annie Ruth, Morgan
motto: Happy am I— from care I'm free, Why aren't they all content, like me?
description: One would have to go far to find a sweeter and nobler girl than Annie Ruth. E. C. T. C. was lucky to get her, for everyone admits she is one of the best sports here. She always carries plenty of "pep," a good disposition, and a kind word and smile for everyone. In addition, she has that indefinable something called personality, which makes her liked by everyone.
text:
Happy am I— from care I'm free, Why aren't they all content, like me?
One would have to go far to find a sweeter and nobler girl than Annie Ruth. E. C. T. C. was lucky to get her, for everyone admits she is one of the best sports here. She always carries plenty of "pep," a good disposition, and a kind word and smile for everyone. In addition, she has that indefinable something called personality, which makes her liked by everyone.

name: Ruth, Munden
motto: She openeth her mouth with wisdom, and in her tongue is the law of kindness.
description: With her modest, composed disposition, Ruth has woven a chain of friendship. A good teacher? Well, I reckon so! And here's a wishing her success.
text:
She openeth her mouth with wisdom, and in her tongue is the law of kindness.
With her modest, composed disposition, Ruth has woven a chain of friendship. A good teacher? Well, I reckon so! And here's a wishing her success.

name: Hazel, Nichols
motto: Much could be said of her, if one could read her mind.
description: Hazel is one girl who glories in the right all women have—the right to speak her mind.
text:
Much could be said of her, if one could read her mind.
Hazel is one girl who glories in the right all women have—the right to speak her mind.

name: Annabel O'Neal
motto: Good nature and good sense must ever join.
description: When everyone else has a frown on their face, Annabel can always find something to laugh about. She is ready for all the fun, as well as her share of work, and no one dares to call her a shirker. We anticipate a great future for her.
text:
Good nature and good sense must ever join.
When everyone else has a frown on their face, Annabel can always find something to laugh about. She is ready for all the fun, as well as her share of work, and no one dares to call her a shirker. We anticipate a great future for her.

name: Beatrice O'Neal
motto: I leave thy praises unexpressed. I leave thy greatness to be guessed.
description: She is a very graceful dancer, and the infinite variety of her character, her sympathies, and her considerate manners have won for her many loyal friends. Though we know not her ambitions, we predict success for her.
text:
I leave thy praises unexpressed. I leave thy greatness to be guessed.
She is a very graceful dancer, and the infinite variety of her character, her sympathies, and her considerate manners have won for her many loyal friends. Though we know not her ambitions, we predict success for her.

name: Mary Louise Outterbridge
motto: In youth and beauty, wisdom is but rare.
description: Good looks, ability, attractiveness and a "sport" combine to make up this pleasing personality known as Mary Louise. She has defied the old saying that "beauty is only skin deep" by her success as a debater. Besides this, she enters into everything connected with college life—especially the making of hot chocolate under all imaginable conditions (such as beds, dressers, etc.) Hail-fellow-well-met with everyone, she has won a host of friends, who consider themselves fortunate in knowing such a girl.
text:
In youth and beauty, wisdom is but rare.
Good looks, ability, attractiveness and a "sport" combine to make up this pleasing personality known as Mary Louise. She has defied the old saying that "beauty is only skin deep" by her success as a debater. Besides this, she enters into everything connected with college life—especially the making of hot chocolate under all imaginable conditions (such as beds, dressers, etc.) Hail-fellow-well-met with everyone, she has won a host of friends, who consider themselves fortunate in knowing such a girl.

name: Eula Page
motto: Duty comes before pleasure.
description: This quiet, dignified girl lives up to her motto—always ready when duty calls her. Yet, we find in her a humorous side. She is always ready for play when her duties are done. Eula is a good friend to have.
text:
Duty comes before pleasure.
This quiet, dignified girl lives up to her motto—always ready when duty calls her. Yet, we find in her a humorous side. She is always ready for play when her duties are done. Eula is a good friend to have.

name: Milah Peele
motto: Say what you have to say, Be what you are and no other way.
description: She has been a faithful member of the class of '23—always ready to enter any project mentioned. Though noted for her sarcasm, she has another predominating characteristic—ambition. She has even expressed a desire to become ruler of the "White House." Her chance seems favorable if some "Mann" doesn't side-track her. Although she laughs at nothing, her classmates expect to hear of her as a successful disciplinarian in the teaching world.
text:
Say what you have to say, Be what you are and no other way.
She has been a faithful member of the class of '23—always ready to enter any project mentioned. Though noted for her sarcasm, she has another predominating characteristic—ambition. She has even expressed a desire to become ruler of the "White House." Her chance seems favorable if some "Mann" doesn't side-track her. Although she laughs at nothing, her classmates expect to hear of her as a successful disciplinarian in the teaching world.

name: Alice Penny
motto: She hath a natural, wise sincerity.
description: A girl like Alice isn't to be found every day. She has two selves—as we meet her in her room (jolly, witty and full of humor), and as we meet her outside—quiet, dignified. She's a friend worth having.
text:
She hath a natural, wise sincerity.
A girl like Alice isn't to be found every day. She has two selves—as we meet her in her room (jolly, witty and full of humor), and as we meet her outside—quiet, dignified. She's a friend worth having.

name: Pope, Alice
motto: She is clever, brilliant and sparkling beyond most of her kind.
description: Here is the greatest combination of brains and personality found anywhere. What kind of personality would one have without temper? Alice has enough of this to put spice in life. She is absolutely true blue, and we count it a privilege to know her.
text:
She is clever, brilliant and sparkling beyond most of her kind.
Here is the greatest combination of brains and personality found anywhere. What kind of personality would one have without temper? Alice has enough of this to put spice in life. She is absolutely true blue, and we count it a privilege to know her.

name: Redd, Eloise
motto: Who to herself is always true, And therefore must be so to you.
description: To have Eloise for a friend is to have one that is loyal and true. In school she is an excellent student, and out of school she is always ready for a good time.
text:
Who to herself is always true, And therefore must be so to you.
To have Eloise for a friend is to have one that is loyal and true. In school she is an excellent student, and out of school she is always ready for a good time.

name: Reed, Ruth
motto: And this little maiden with no other fault Than to love and be loved.
description: Although Ruth is small, she has a big heart, of which fact we are constantly aware by her sunshiny disposition and her ability for making others love her. She is quiet and retiring, but has an appealing personality, which makes one know she is a real pal.
text:
And this little maiden with no other fault Than to love and be loved.
Although Ruth is small, she has a big heart, of which fact we are constantly aware by her sunshiny disposition and her ability for making others love her. She is quiet and retiring, but has an appealing personality, which makes one know she is a real pal.

name: Rice, Vivian
motto: She has the mildest manners and the bravest mind.
description: She came to us in her Sophomore year, And added joy to all of us here; To her history is as hard as thunder, But in arithmetic she is a wonder. As a teacher we expect her to shine, And then her happiness will be sublime.
text:
She has the mildest manners and the bravest mind.
She came to us in her Sophomore year, And added joy to all of us here; To her history is as hard as thunder, But in arithmetic she is a wonder. As a teacher we expect her to shine, And then her happiness will be sublime.

name: Roberts, Mae Willis
motto: What's the use of worrying? It never was worth while.
description: From the picture one would conclude Mae Willis a very dignified girl, but just slip up on her when she is in another girl's room. Between stitches in knitting or crocheting she entertains her friends with humor and heartily laughs. Too, Mae Willis is very brilliant and studious when she is interested in a subject.
text:
What's the use of worrying? It never was worth while.
From the picture one would conclude Mae Willis a very dignified girl, but just slip up on her when she is in another girl's room. Between stitches in knitting or crocheting she entertains her friends with humor and heartily laughs. Too, Mae Willis is very brilliant and studious when she is interested in a subject.

name: Rogers, Nina
motto: Much I know, but to know all is my ambition.
description: She is tall, quiet, brunette, and one we will always be watching out for. Really, she is not as serious and dignified as one might expect, for when she is with a crowd and tells them what she knows (not all), it is easily seen that she's living up to the above motto.
text:
Much I know, but to know all is my ambition.
She is tall, quiet, brunette, and one we will always be watching out for. Really, she is not as serious and dignified as one might expect, for when she is with a crowd and tells them what she knows (not all), it is easily seen that she's living up to the above motto.

name: Rogers, Noma
motto: Thy modesty is a candle to thy merit.
description: This member of our class has a peculiar gift—the ability to attract little children. Yet there is no mystery about her power—she just loves them. The same about "big" children—if she likes you, she likes you lots; in the same manner she dislikes you. This is Noma, and we all like her.
text:
Thy modesty is a candle to thy merit.
This member of our class has a peculiar gift—the ability to attract little children. Yet there is no mystery about her power—she just loves them. The same about "big" children—if she likes you, she likes you lots; in the same manner she dislikes you. This is Noma, and we all like her.

name: Russell, Eula
motto: Start right, aim right, and keep pegging away.
description: Eula is a true and noble friend through all troubles. She is jolly, self-willed and determined. Here's wishing her the best success.
text:
Start right, aim right, and keep pegging away.
Eula is a true and noble friend through all troubles. She is jolly, self-willed and determined. Here's wishing her the best success.

name: Sewell, Roxie
motto: She can who thinks she can.
description: Roxie is quiet, studious and ambitious—on whom you can depend at all times. She is loved by her friends for her kind and gentle manner, and with her persistent determination, she is bound to win in whatever she attempts.
text:
She can who thinks she can.
Roxie is quiet, studious and ambitious—on whom you can depend at all times. She is loved by her friends for her kind and gentle manner, and with her persistent determination, she is bound to win in whatever she attempts.

name: Smith, Pattie Barrow
motto: Time is flying away; catch it!
description: Pattie could truly be called a "Mercury" of today. Though she's seen hooking a dress or adjusting a hair net on her way to breakfast—she gets there! But she always gets to class, and she gets there with the goods, too. Pattie's slight in stature, but big as to a kind and generous heart. Why can't we have more like her?
text:
Time is flying away; catch it!
Pattie could truly be called a "Mercury" of today. Though she's seen hooking a dress or adjusting a hair net on her way to breakfast—she gets there! But she always gets to class, and she gets there with the goods, too. Pattie's slight in stature, but big as to a kind and generous heart. Why can't we have more like her?

name: Stewart, Mary Joe
motto: Silence is golden.
description: Mary Joe is one of the smallest members of our class. "Small packages are most valuable." She is one of the most "studious" girls you can find, and her will power will carry her safe in her life-work. Three Rahs for Mary Joe!
text:
Silence is golden.
Mary Joe is one of the smallest members of our class. "Small packages are most valuable." She is one of the most "studious" girls you can find, and her will power will carry her safe in her life-work. Three Rahs for Mary Joe!

name: Stokes, Nannie Lindsay
motto: Her voice is seldom heard, but when she speaks it ravishes all senses.
description: Gentle, sweet and kind is Nannie, our class poet of whom we are proud. By her sweet voice is she known among us. Nannie always stands high in her studies—very bright and industrious.
text:
Her voice is seldom heard, but when she speaks it ravishes all senses.
Gentle, sweet and kind is Nannie, our class poet of whom we are proud. By her sweet voice is she known among us. Nannie always stands high in her studies—very bright and industrious.

name: Sugg, Lillian
motto: My heart has learned to glow for others' good, and melt at others' woe.
description: Here stands Lillian among her many friends, waiting to do a good deed. Always cheerful and helpful we find Lillian, and never happier than when doing something for her friends. A good sport in every way is what we find in her.
text:
My heart has learned to glow for others' good, and melt at others' woe.
Here stands Lillian among her many friends, waiting to do a good deed. Always cheerful and helpful we find Lillian, and never happier than when doing something for her friends. A good sport in every way is what we find in her.

name: Sullivan, Elma
motto: Methinks I heard a strain of silver music.
description: Elma is an important member of the class of '23. She puts her soul into her playing. The class boasts to have Elma as the first student in the college to compose a song, which is taught in the Model School. Elma is faithful in every task which she undertakes.
text:
Methinks I heard a strain of silver music.
Elma is an important member of the class of '23. She puts her soul into her playing. The class boasts to have Elma as the first student in the college to compose a song, which is taught in the Model School. Elma is faithful in every task which she undertakes.

name: Uzzle, Lucy Gunn
motto: A friend in need is a friend indeed.
description: Lucy Gunn is a friend indeed, and lives up to her motto. Her favorite greeting is "Children, I'm falling off, ain't I?" Her reliability is unquestionable, and she is ready and prepared for any occasion, whatever it may be. All in all, "to know her is to love her."
text:
A friend in need is a friend indeed.
Lucy Gunn is a friend indeed, and lives up to her motto. Her favorite greeting is "Children, I'm falling off, ain't I?" Her reliability is unquestionable, and she is ready and prepared for any occasion, whatever it may be. All in all, "to know her is to love her."

name: Vann, Julia
motto: Kind hearts are more than coronets.
description: Little in physique, but a giantess in heart—for Julia is ever generous, and has an unbounded love and interest in human nature. She works untiringly till the task is done.
text:
Kind hearts are more than coronets.
Little in physique, but a giantess in heart—for Julia is ever generous, and has an unbounded love and interest in human nature. She works untiringly till the task is done.

name: Vaughn, Elsie
motto: To her stream of talk there is no dam.
description: After digging three terms under careful watchcare of our "Psychologist," Elsie "Mae's" classmates have come to the conclusion that she can easily "adapt herself to any situation." She's to be envied of the fact that she can read novels until 10:30 at night, and then show up better on class next day than anyone else! Thoughtful and unselfish? That's what she is exactly—she thinks doubly—once for herself, and the other for her roommate. With an I. Q. like hers we know she's "gonna" succeed.
text:
To her stream of talk there is no dam.
After digging three terms under careful watchcare of our "Psychologist," Elsie "Mae's" classmates have come to the conclusion that she can easily "adapt herself to any situation." She's to be envied of the fact that she can read novels until 10:30 at night, and then show up better on class next day than anyone else! Thoughtful and unselfish? That's what she is exactly—she thinks doubly—once for herself, and the other for her roommate. With an I. Q. like hers we know she's "gonna" succeed.

name: Vaughn, Mary
motto: She lives content, and envies none, Not even a monarch on his throne.
description: Mary is as quiet and placid as the night breeze. She is always ready to do her duty. With her persistent determination she is bound to win.
text:
She lives content, and envies none, Not even a monarch on his throne.
Mary is as quiet and placid as the night breeze. She is always ready to do her duty. With her persistent determination she is bound to win.

name: Wade, Ruth
motto: Good nature and good sense must ever join.
description: She is always happy and ready for mischief, which can be told by one glance at her eyes. She is always willing and ready to help her classmates when they ask her.
text:
Good nature and good sense must ever join.
She is always happy and ready for mischief, which can be told by one glance at her eyes. She is always willing and ready to help her classmates when they ask her.

name: Waite, Marjorie
motto: Smile all the while.
description: In short, Marjorie might be called our "sunshine girl." She always wears a smile regardless of how difficult the task may be. Her sweet disposition has won for her a place in our hearts, which will be a lasting memory. We predict for her a most successful future in whatever she undertakes to do.
text:
Smile all the while.
In short, Marjorie might be called our "sunshine girl." She always wears a smile regardless of how difficult the task may be. Her sweet disposition has won for her a place in our hearts, which will be a lasting memory. We predict for her a most successful future in whatever she undertakes to do.

name: Walker, Pat
motto: From care I'm free, Why can't they all be happy like me?
description: "Pat" is a treasure—when we need a friend we go to her, for never was one so willing to help, especially when anyone is in trouble. She is a genuine good sport—and never troubles trouble, and is ready for all the fun. We can sum "Pat" up as being a true, lovable and sweet girl, and we wish her the best success.
text:
From care I'm free, Why can't they all be happy like me?
"Pat" is a treasure—when we need a friend we go to her, for never was one so willing to help, especially when anyone is in trouble. She is a genuine good sport—and never troubles trouble, and is ready for all the fun. We can sum "Pat" up as being a true, lovable and sweet girl, and we wish her the best success.

name: Wells, Helen
motto: If she will she will, but if she won't, she won't.
description: Another scientific theory exploded! Here's a girl who never lets her temper run away with her, despite the fact that she has very "radiant" hair. She runs for all the fun, for she will never be sad when there is any fun around. Her good nature, congenial smile and perseverance combine to make her one of the most loyal of the class of '23.
text:
If she will she will, but if she won't, she won't.
Another scientific theory exploded! Here's a girl who never lets her temper run away with her, despite the fact that she has very "radiant" hair. She runs for all the fun, for she will never be sad when there is any fun around. Her good nature, congenial smile and perseverance combine to make her one of the most loyal of the class of '23.

name: West, Laura
motto: Unconcerned, but true, If she likes you, will stand by you.
description: Laura is a member of that formidable group who spends all its energy on "drawing note-books." Her penmanship is held up as an example for the less fortunate to follow. A good combination for a primary teacher, is it not?
text:
Unconcerned, but true, If she likes you, will stand by you.
Laura is a member of that formidable group who spends all its energy on "drawing note-books." Her penmanship is held up as an example for the less fortunate to follow. A good combination for a primary teacher, is it not?

name: West, Mittie
motto: Life is real, life is earnest.
description: Here is a girl who has never been known to let a "practice period" slip. Remarkable, isn't it? She has been heard to remark that these are the most enjoyable moments of the day. We predict that the musical world will hear much of Mittie.
text:
Life is real, life is earnest.
Here is a girl who has never been known to let a "practice period" slip. Remarkable, isn't it? She has been heard to remark that these are the most enjoyable moments of the day. We predict that the musical world will hear much of Mittie.

name: Wheeler, Eula
motto: For all she has a kindly thought; From her, unkind remarks are seldom heard.
description: Eula is one of our girls who is always willing to help others. She walks in her own gentle way, and is one of the few who has learned not to meddle with other people's affairs.
text:
For all she has a kindly thought; From her, unkind remarks are seldom heard.
Eula is one of our girls who is always willing to help others. She walks in her own gentle way, and is one of the few who has learned not to meddle with other people's affairs.

name: White, Inez
motto: She can who thinks she can.
description: With her persistent determination she is always bound to win. Inez is known for her smile. It was missed, however, when she taught seventh grade Geography, for her motto was, "Work while you work."
text:
She can who thinks she can.
With her persistent determination she is always bound to win. Inez is known for her smile. It was missed, however, when she taught seventh grade Geography, for her motto was, "Work while you work."

name: White, Mildred
motto: As busy as a bee.
description: Here's an unusual girl, but when it comes to lessons she is quite positively on the good side. If she works as hard and faithfully in later life as she has done for us, she will undoubtedly succeed. We wish her great success in her chosen profession.
text:
As busy as a bee.
Here's an unusual girl, but when it comes to lessons she is quite positively on the good side. If she works as hard and faithfully in later life as she has done for us, she will undoubtedly succeed. We wish her great success in her chosen profession.

name: Winstead, Rose
motto: There is a Rose without a thorn.
description: Just 'Rose' is what we call her, and though not always as soft as that name might imply, she is nice to be around. For reference, call on the Banking and Trust Company, of Greenville, N. C. As she goes out to enter upon her profession we advise that she keep her eyes open, so that she can find—her "Ideal" man.
text:
There is a Rose without a thorn.
Just 'Rose' is what we call her, and though not always as soft as that name might imply, she is nice to be around. For reference, call on the Banking and Trust Company, of Greenville, N. C. As she goes out to enter upon her profession we advise that she keep her eyes open, so that she can find—her "Ideal" man.

name: Wooten, Mabel
motto: Her air, her smile, her notions, told of womanly completeness.
description: "Ted" is one girl that glories in the right that women have—that right is, the right to speak her mind. She is zealous in her work, thoughtful, loving, and sympathetic with her friends, a jolly good sport, ready for fun. This is "Ted," and we all like her.
text:
Her air, her smile, her notions, told of womanly completeness.
"Ted" is one girl that glories in the right that women have—that right is, the right to speak her mind. She is zealous in her work, thoughtful, loving, and sympathetic with her friends, a jolly good sport, ready for fun. This is "Ted," and we all like her.

name: Worrel, Irma
motto: To those that know thee not no words can paint, And those that know thee, know all words are faint.
description: Irma is small, but judge not by size, for she has shown that she not only possesses ability as a teacher, but has proved to be an equally good "Chauffeur," driving to and from Winterville. Her good disposition is indeed to be envied. Irma is never too busy to stroll up and down the campus in hopes of seeing and hearing someone called "Cheese." We wish for her the happiest life when she takes her M. R. S. degree.
text:
To those that know thee not no words can paint, And those that know thee, know all words are faint.
Irma is small, but judge not by size, for she has shown that she not only possesses ability as a teacher, but has proved to be an equally good "Chauffeur," driving to and from Winterville. Her good disposition is indeed to be envied. Irma is never too busy to stroll up and down the campus in hopes of seeing and hearing someone called "Cheese." We wish for her the happiest life when she takes her M. R. S. degree.
